Bash(for id in exp_0476 exp_0979 exp_1030 exp_1082; do
  echo "=== $id ==="
  grep "\\"id\\": \\"$id\\"" data/role_edges/role_edges.jsonl | python3 -c "
import json,sys
r=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\('canonical_entities:', r.get\('canonical_entities',[]\)\)
print\('entity_edges:'\)
for e in r.get\('entity_edges',[]\): print\(' ', e\)
"
done)

Bash(python3 -c "
import json
with open\('/Users/hanxiao/Project/GSEM/data/backup/MedRbench.json'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)
task_types = {}
for k, v in data.items\(\):
    tt = v.get\('task_type', 'unknown'\)
    task_types[tt] = task_types.get\(tt, 0\) + 1
print\('Train total:', len\(data\), 'task_types:', task_types\)
sample_key = list\(data.keys\(\)\)[0]
print\('Sample entry:', json.dumps\(data[sample_key], indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)[:500]\)
"
